name: October Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, allspice and nutmeg in a bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, combine maple syrup, butter and eggs, and beat with an electric mixer for 3 minutes. Stir in yams, apples, walnuts, raisins, cream and marmalade by hand.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients, stirring well after each addition; the batter will be stiff.
5. Pour the batter into lightly oiled 9 x 5-inch loaf pans.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 60-70 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Let cake cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
8. Turn the cakes onto the racks and let them cool completely before slicing.
